## Checklist

- [ ] **Documentation**: New or modified docs are listed in `docs/README.md`
- [ ] **Test traits**: Tests include appropriate `[Trait("Category", "...")]` and `[Trait("Engine", "...")]` attributes
- [ ] **Rendering tests**: Rendering-affecting changes include at least one rendering-specific test
- [ ] **Build**: `dotnet build Broiler.slnx` succeeds
- [ ] **Tests**: `dotnet test Broiler.slnx` passes
